pattern: Greedily scan runs of identical characters, capping each run at 9, and emit the count followed by the character.
hints: Walk the string left to right, tracking the current character and how many consecutive times it has appeared.
When a new character is encountered or the count reaches 9, flush the current run to the output as count+char.
The result is fully determined by the greedy scan — no backtracking or lookahead is needed.

edge_inputs.description: run of exactly 10 must split into 9+1
run of 18 must split into two 9s

stress.description: random lowercase string with frequent repeated characters
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    import string
    chars = string.ascii_lowercase[:6]
    word = ''.join(rng.choice(chars) for _ in range(min(size, 1000)))
    return [word]
